task: Replace manual recommerce OJT product selection with conservative local-LLM evidence selection

requirements.evidence: core/recommerce_market_research.py requires a local Ollama selector and persists model identity, decision evidence and candidate evidence.

requirements.requirement: No manual product selection or forced recommendation
requirements.evidence: selection_policy sets human_manual_selection_allowed=false and fail_closed=true; empty qualified output renders selection hold.
Hard gates require comparable samples, mall diversity, low price dispersion, LLM score >=75 and worst-case supplier ceiling >=3000 KRW.

requirements.requirement: No actual purchase or external inquiry
requirements.evidence: Frontend has no order/listing/message API and keeps commercial readiness blocked pending supplier and shipping evidence.

governance_bootstrap.summary: Applied real-entrypoint verification, completion evidence, capital-action boundary and CEO-only Red Team rule.
Applied origin-main deployment, secret protection, fail-safe completion evidence and no automatic Red Team invariant.

verification.name: local live Naver plus Ollama selection
verification.result: passed: local Ollama gemma4:latest returned a valid decision; no product passed all conservative gates, so candidates=[] and selection hold was preserved.

verification.name: focused recommerce regression suite
verification.target: local recommerce API and selection logic
verification.result: passed: 18 tests, including local-LLM absence, low LLM score and source-failure fail-closed regression cases.

verification.name: frontend build and page lint
verification.command: cd harness-os/frontend && npm run build && npx eslint src/pages/RecommercePage.tsx
verification.result: passed: Vite production bundle built and the changed Recommerce page has zero lint findings.

verification.name: Mac Mini production API selection state
verification.command: Mac Mini local authenticated curl after scripts/run_recommerce_market_research.py
verification.result: passed: API returned selection_blocked_no_evidence_qualified_product, provider ollama, model gemma4:latest, error null, candidate_pool_count 10 and candidate_count 0.

verification.name: Mac Mini served frontend bundle
verification.command: curl served index-C6AFXxao.js and verify four UX markers
verification.result: passed: 사람이 상품을 고르지 않습니다, LLM 보수심사, 선정 보류 and 허용 공급가 상한 are in the served bundle; port 5173 is listening.

deploy.result: passed: Mac Mini backup scratch/pre_deploy_backup_20260719_204954, atomic frontend bundle index-C6AFXxao.js, backend reload on port 8000, and all five scoped paths matched origin/main.

residual_risk: Naver API omits shipping, supplier stock and wholesale terms; the system intentionally blocks commercial readiness until separately evidenced.
